case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. SPA CLEANERS, INC et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $372.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SPA CLEANERS, INC LEE, SOOK I.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SPA CLEANERS, INC LEE, SOOK I. DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-13-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-15-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-29-2004
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED OCT-18-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SOOK I.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPA CLEANERS, INC LEE, SOOK I. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 SIGNATURE GEO918 40 LBS DRY CLEANING MACHINE , FAIR MARKET VALUE $ 8,000.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $360.84, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $21,246.46 DAMAGES, $2,450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $372.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,068.96, $ 360.84 IS THE INTEREST , SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH . SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
